# Personal Data Act

Jurisdiction: Norway
Region: NO
Citation: Personal Data Act
Authority: Lovdata / Datatilsynet
Source URL: https://lovdata.no/dokument/NLE/lov/2018-06-15-38
Topics: lawful_basis, children_data, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, accountability
Keywords: Norway Personal Data Act, Datatilsynet, GDPR EEA

## Summary
Norway's act implementing GDPR in the EEA context with national supplements.

## Key compliance obligations
- Apply Norwegian supplementary provisions to GDPR processing.
- Check children's consent and sensitive-data contexts.
- Track Datatilsynet guidance and enforcement.
